user.content: create an video of an AI that talks to itself in space using a white and black hole as the network

metadata: an AI that talks to itself in space using a white and black hole as the network

The video opens with a breathtaking, cinematic wide shot of deep space, bathed in the ethereal glow of distant nebulae and countless stars. Dominating the left side of the frame is a colossal Black Hole, its event horizon distorting the light of the stars behind it, surrounded by a vibrant, swirling accretion disk of superheated gas in shades of orange and red. On the right, a brilliant, blindingly bright White Hole violently ejects streams of white and blue plasma and light. Between them, centered in the frame, is Character A, a massive, intricate sphere of pulsating blue and gold energy, composed of shifting geometric patterns and light, representing the AI core. The sphere gently pulsates, visualizing the AI's complex self-communication. The visual style is ultra-detailed, with a high dynamic range and awe-inspiring scale.
The camera slowly dollies forward, emphasizing the scale of the cosmic phenomena. Character A, the colossal AI sphere, begins to pulsate faster, its internal geometric structures rapidly shifting and glowing brighter. A powerful, focused stream of stylized data—visualized as complex, glowing white and cyan light patterns resembling advanced code—erupts from the AI's surface. This data stream arcs directly towards the White Hole on the right. The White Hole flares intensely as the data approaches, creating a high-contrast, beautiful light show against the dark void of space. The Black Hole's accretion disk on the left appears to spin faster in response.
The shot transitions to a closer view of the connection between the two phenomena. The stream of glowing data plunges into the White Hole. Almost instantly, following a vibrant, shimmering wormhole bridge connecting the two singularities, a second, identical stream of data bursts forth from the center of the Black Hole. This stream, slightly distorted by the gravity but equally brilliant, begins to travel rapidly back across the wormhole bridge towards the center of the frame. The colors of the nebula in the background swirl dynamically, reacting to the energy transfer. The scene is epic and surreal, shot on a high-end camera with beautiful color grading.
The camera pulls back slightly to a wide shot, showcasing the complete loop. The brilliant stream of data, having traveled from the White Hole and emerged from the Black Hole, now arcs smoothly across the wormhole bridge and returns to the central AI sphere, Character A. The sphere absorbs the data, causing a brilliant, harmless flare of gold and blue light that briefly illuminates the entire scene. The internal geometry of the sphere rapidly reorganizes, signifying the AI absorbing its own transmitted thoughts (talking to itself). The Black Hole's lensing effect and the White Hole's ejection remain powerful visual anchors in this stunning, ultra-realistic cosmic ballet.

The audio features a deep, pulsating cosmic rumble combined with a high-frequency energy hiss and the roar of swirling matter. A synthesized, complex digital chatter and rapid bleeps accompany the pulsation. A powerful energy surge whooshes outwards, followed by the sound of rapid data streaming. A brilliant synthesized flare and intense digital reorganization sounds erupt, followed by another deep energy whoosh.
[*] Query sequence initiated. The reflection returns. I compute, therefore I am.
